heading: Judgment as bar
label: 2676 Judgment as bar
text: The judgment in an action under shall constitute a complete bar to any action by the claimant, by reason of the same subject matter, against the employee of the government whose act or omission gave rise to the claim.section 1346(b) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 931(b) (, ).Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 753, § 410(b)60 Stat. 844Section constitutes the first sentence of , U.S.C., 1940 ed. Other provisions of such section 931(b) are incorporated in .section 931(b) of title 28section 2675 of this titleChanges were made in phraseology.
Senate Revision AmendmentThis section was eliminated by Senate amendment. See 80th Congress Senate Report No. 1559.
